sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka mawh na teng paai in,
Tuni a kipan in, Hong tang khin aw.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong guan in tha le ngal, Tha nuamsak in,
Kei a’ ding, Nong si ta,
Mit ngei lo ka sungah Lum densak in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Pial lo, hong naisak in, Nangma kiang tawh.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Leitung nun tom bei a, Sihna gun ka
Launa lunghih mawhna, Hong paihkhiat sak inla,
